SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF JIEHAT CHALABI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MIREK KUCERA IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN TRUE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHALABI, JIEHAT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUCERA, MIREK $1,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,400.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
